results.description: Check S3 Account Level Public Access Block.
results.remediation_text: You can enable Public Access Block at the account level to prevent the exposure of your data stored in S3.

results.description: Check if S3 buckets have ACLs enabled
results.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 ACLs are disabled (BucketOwnerEnforced). Use IAM policies and bucket policies to manage access.

results.description: This check verifies that S3 bucket policies are configured in a way that limits access to the intended AWS accounts only, preventing unauthorized access by external or unintended accounts.
results.remediation_text: Review and update your S3 bucket policies to remove permissions that grant external AWS accounts access to critical actions and implement least privilege principles to ensure sensitive operations are restricted to trusted accounts only

results.description: Verifying whether S3 buckets have cross-region replication enabled, ensuring data redundancy and availability across multiple AWS regions
results.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 buckets have cross region replication.

remediation_actions.planner_reasoning: Lỗi s3_bucket_cross_region_replication liên quan đến việc kiểm tra Cross-Region Replication (CRR), vì vậy sử dụng công cụ s3_prepare_replication để xác định điều kiện cần thiết để bật CRR

tool_description.intent: Kiểm tra điều kiện để bật Cross-Region Replication (CRR).
behavior: Chỉ kiểm tra versioning và trạng thái replication.
limitations: Không tạo IAM Role, bucket đích hoặc replication rule.
Luôn yêu cầu thao tác thủ công để hoàn tất CRR.
tool_description.raw_doc:
Mục đích: Kiểm tra điều kiện để bật Cross-Region Replication (CRR).
Dùng khi: Finding thiếu CRR hoặc chưa có replication rule.
Tự động: Chỉ kiểm tra versioning và trạng thái replication.
Giới hạn: Không tạo IAM Role, bucket đích hoặc replication rule.
Lưu ý: Luôn yêu cầu thao tác thủ công để hoàn tất CRR.

results.description: Check if S3 buckets have default encryption (SSE) enabled or use a bucket policy to enforce it.
results.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 buckets have encryption at rest enabled.

results.description: Ensure whether S3 buckets have event notifications enabled.
results.remediation_text: Enable event notifications for all S3 general-purpose buckets to monitor important events such as object creation, deletion, tagging, and lifecycle events, ensuring visibility and quick action on relevant changes.

results.description: Check if S3 buckets have KMS encryption enabled.
results.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 buckets have encryption at rest enabled using KMS.

results.description: Check S3 Bucket Level Public Access Block.
results.remediation_text: You can enable Public Access Block at the bucket level to prevent the exposure of your data stored in S3.

results.description: Check if S3 buckets have Lifecycle configuration enabled.
results.remediation_text: Enable lifecycle policies on your S3 buckets to automatically manage the transition and expiration of data.

results.description: Check if S3 bucket MFA Delete is not enabled.
results.remediation_text: Adding MFA delete to an S3 bucket, requires additional authentication when you change the version state of your bucket or you delete and object version adding another layer of security in the event your security credentials are compromised or unauthorized access is granted.

remediation_actions.planner_reasoning: Lỗi s3_bucket_no_mfa_delete yêu cầu bật MFA Delete, nên chọn công cụ s3_enable_mfa_delete để sửa lỗi

tool_description.intent: Bật versioning để chuẩn bị cho MFA Delete.
limitations: Không thể bật MFA Delete (yêu cầu Root + MFA token).
Trả về manual-required cho bước bật MFA Delete.
tool_description.raw_doc:
Mục đích: Bật versioning để chuẩn bị cho MFA Delete.
Dùng khi: Finding thiếu MFA Delete.
Tự động: Bật versioning.
Giới hạn: Không thể bật MFA Delete (yêu cầu Root + MFA token).
Lưu ý: Trả về manual-required cho bước bật MFA Delete.

results.tool_code:
@tool
def s3_enable_mfa_delete(resource_id: str, region: str = "us-east-1"):
    """
    Mục đích: Bật versioning để chuẩn bị cho MFA Delete.
    Dùng khi: Finding thiếu MFA Delete.
    Tự động: Bật versioning.
    Giới hạn: Không thể bật MFA Delete (yêu cầu Root + MFA token).
    Lưu ý: Trả về manual-required cho bước bật MFA Delete.
    """

    client = boto3.client("s3", region_name=region)

    result = {
        "success": False,
        "status": "manual_required",
        "manual_required": True,
        "resource": resource_id,
        "performed_actions": [],
        "remaining_actions": ["Enable MFA Delete using AWS CLI with Root MFA token"],
        "reason": "AWS does not allow enabling MFA Delete programmatically.",
        "verification": {"before": {}, "after": {}, "passed": False},
    }

    try:
        # BEFORE
        before = client.get_bucket_versioning(Bucket=resource_id)
        result["verification"]["before"] = before

        # PARTIAL ACTION
        client.put_bucket_versioning(
            Bucket=resource_id, VersioningConfiguration={"Status": "Enabled"}
        )
        result["performed_actions"].append("Enabled Versioning")

        # AFTER
        after = client.get_bucket_versioning(Bucket=resource_id)
        result["verification"]["after"] = after

        return json.dumps(result)

    except Exception as e:
        result["status"] = "failed"
        result["reason"] = str(e)
        return json.dumps(result)

results.description: Check if S3 buckets have object lock enabled
results.remediation_text: Ensure that your Amazon S3 buckets have Object Lock feature enabled in order to prevent the objects they store from being deleted.

results.description: Check if S3 buckets have object versioning enabled
results.remediation_text: Configure versioning using the Amazon console or API for buckets with sensitive information that is changing frequently, and backup may not be enough to capture all the changes.

results.description: Check if S3 buckets have policies which allow WRITE access.
results.remediation_text: Ensure proper bucket policy is in place with the least privilege principle applied.

results.description: Ensure there are no S3 buckets open to Everyone or Any AWS user.
results.remediation_text: You can enable block public access settings only for access points, buckets and AWS accounts. Amazon S3 does not support block public access settings on a per-object basis. When you apply block public access settings to an account, the settings apply to all AWS Regions globally. The settings might not take effect in all Regions immediately or simultaneously, but they eventually propagate to all Regions.

results.description: Ensure there are no S3 buckets listable by Everyone or Any AWS customer.
results.remediation_text: You can enable block public access settings only for access points, buckets and AWS accounts. Amazon S3 does not support block public access settings on a per-object basis. When you apply block public access settings to an account, the settings apply to all AWS Regions globally. The settings might not take effect in all Regions immediately or simultaneously, but they eventually propagate to all Regions.

results.description: Ensure there are no S3 buckets writable by Everyone or Any AWS customer.
results.remediation_text: You can enable block public access settings only for access points, buckets and AWS accounts. Amazon S3 does not support block public access settings on a per-object basis. When you apply block public access settings to an account, the settings apply to all AWS Regions globally. The settings might not take effect in all Regions immediately or simultaneously, but they eventually propagate to all Regions.

results.description: Check if S3 buckets have secure transport policy.
results.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 buckets have encryption in transit enabled.

remediation_actions.planner_reasoning: Lỗi S3 Bucket Secure Transport Policy yêu cầu bật SecureTransport = true, do đó chọn công cụ s3_secure_transport để sửa lỗi

execution_output.message: Successfully enforced and VERIFIED SSL policy for logs-065209282642-us-east-1.
execution_output.note: Prowler/Security Hub may take time to update status to PASSED.

execution_output.message: Successfully enforced and VERIFIED SSL policy for logs-065209282642-us-east-1.
execution_output.note: Prowler/Security Hub may take time to update status to PASSED.

tool_description.intent: Bắt buộc truy cập HTTPS bằng bucket policy.
tool_description.raw_doc:
Mục đích: Bắt buộc truy cập HTTPS bằng bucket policy.
Dùng khi: Finding yêu cầu SecureTransport = true.
Cơ chế: Safe Merge (không ghi đè policy khác) + Self-Verification.

results.description: Check if S3 buckets have server access logging enabled
results.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 buckets have Logging enabled. CloudTrail data events can be used in place of S3 bucket logging. If that is the case, this finding can be considered a false positive.

results.description: Checks for S3 buckets with predictable names that could be hijacked by an attacker before legitimate use, leading to data leakage or other security breaches.
results.remediation_text: Ensure that all S3 buckets associated with your AWS account are owned by your account. Be cautious of services that create buckets with predictable names. Whenever possible, pre-create these buckets in all regions to prevent hijacking.
